summary: Staging cluster auth outage blocks new onboarding
description: Two new hires could not get tokens issued against staging this morning, blocking the first day setup described in the onboarding pages. Token requests returned a signature error for every subject.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: The token secret in src/api/auth.ts was rotated yesterday for staging but the issuing side of internal tooling still had the old secret cached. Every newly issued token failed verification against the new secret.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: confirmed, restarting the tooling service to pick up the new secret now

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: Fixed once the tooling service restarted and picked up the current secret. New tokens verify correctly. Sam, your onboarding folks should be unblocked now.

comments.author: Sam Whitfield
comments.body: confirmed both got in, thanks for the fast turnaround
